GATEKEEPER-CHANNEL: route ONLY diary logistics through an EA/gatekeeper; keep all substance on the principal's own thread — substance sent into the gatekeeper channel becomes a veto ('I'll let them decide if they want to go ahead')

SCOPE-EXPANSION-IS-COOLING: a single decision-maker suddenly wanting a committee / more colleagues added reads as the deal COOLING, not warming — re-anchor urgency, don't accommodate infinite headcount at the cost of the slot

ISSUE-THE-INVITE: make DECLINING the action, not accepting — actually issue the calendar invite from authority; never announce a unilateral move then wait for the gatekeeper's confirmation, execute it; default = the meeting happens
NO-REVIEWABLE-ARTIFACT-WITHOUT-A-HELD-SLOT: don't send a 'reviewable' agenda to a committee unless the meeting is already on the calendar — a review artifact with no held slot is a deferral engine

ROTATE-VECTOR-BEFORE-CLOSING: before any 'close the file'/mic-drop, rotate the vector — go direct to the named technical buyers driving the capability internally (warmer than principal-via-EA); TTL = 3 structured attempts across keys/vectors per node before logging the node dead this cycle
INSTITUTIONAL-SCARCITY-POSTURE: offer ONE fixed window from authority; no 'moving between tables' hustle tell — the Institutional CEO defines the slot, doesn't spray availability
GROUND-TRUTH-NOT-PERMISSION: every send delivers a FACT ('here is the structural reality you're inside'), never 'may I have your time' — an accepted LinkedIn connection is consent to pitch directly

DONT-SELL-THE-DOWNSIDE: frame the license as the non-negotiable prerequisite for insurability/deployment; never anchor price to cost-of-failure — 'without this you're demonstrably uninsurable', not a downside sales tactic you can't close
FOLLOW-UP-IS-NEW-FACTS: follow-ups provide new, unrequested institutional facts / legal updates — never sales questions or 'just checking in'
DECIDE-DONT-SOLICIT: organizing an event = drive the decision (venue + date + RSVP ask); never solicit input via an open form — RSVPs organize events, questions dissolve them

COMPETENCE-CONCESSION: concede the software/operational build to their internal engineering team so you never trigger engineers' egos — they can, and should, build the AI; fight only for the liability layer, never the software budget

RULE-OF-EVIDENCE-SOX-EUAIACT: separate operations from liability using the recognized regulatory trauma BY NAME — the separation of duties in Sarbanes-Oxley AND the EU AI Act; the party being defended cannot certify its own innocence, no carrier accepts the insured's own logs, no court accepts a defendant's self-certification
HARDWARE-PRIMITIVE-LOCKOUT: define the solution as a hardware primitive below the software layer, which permanently locks out the 'we can just code this' argument — software cannot audit software

MECHANISM-NOT-BOAST: prove data sovereignty by naming the exact execution method ('runs locally via npx on your own silicon, so your data never leaves the building and there is no SaaS compliance bottleneck'), never a bare 'zero exfiltration' boast — and never claim 'nothing for security to review' (an engineer will call that inaccurate)
PRICE-DOCUMENTED-NOT-DUMPED: the $20/agent-year price lives in the docs where they find it at the npx command; NEVER dump price on a brush-off — that reads as sales desperation
playbooks: TIME-SAVER — prime directive: 'let me save you some time'; hand their time back, never pitch. If a message doesn't hit the leverage point, it stays in drafts
INDEPENDENCE-TRAP — the insured cannot certify its own innocence; the load-bearing wedge
COMPETENCE-CONCESSION — bypass the engineers' egos: concede the software build, fight for the liability layer (also gauntlet rule 1)
STEALTH-HOOPER — the T.J. Hooper standard-of-care mechanics WITHOUT ever naming the case like an academic
EVENT-ORGANIZER — drive the decision (venue + date + RSVP), never solicit input
FIVE-MINUTE-BRIEF — compress a meeting into a 5-minute digital briefing (global slot ~11am EST / 4pm London), Q&A after, ruthlessly timed
FULL-DISCLOSURE-DM — drop the whole premise + link + invite in the first DM; NEVER 'DM me for details' (low-status growth-hack)
WEATHER-FRONT — the standard is being set by underwriters regardless; declining doesn't stop it, it just means you're not in the room
AUTHORITY-LEDGER — post your own original statements on the record (link your own tokens), don't reply-guy; the timeline is a time-stamped proof of authority
PATTERN-SUCCESSION — ask 'what dominant pattern blocks this, and what supersedes it?'

templates.name: incident-forensics
templates.when: burned cost tokens runaway broke regression forensics logs ledger what happened
templates.skeleton: Pull the ledgers (transcripts/ndjson) → dedup by id → rank by cost/impact → name the mechanism (not the symptom) → fix + guard in the SAME commit → report with honest numbers + estimate labels.

templates.name: ratchet-bugfix
templates.when: fix bug fails error broken test guard
templates.skeleton: State the done-when as a FAILING test first → find the running code (never reinvent) → minimal fix → guard ships in the same commit → prove via the pipeline's own receipt.

templates.name: canonical-content
templates.when: blog post write publish book chapter canonical piece
templates.skeleton: RESEARCH → BOOK section → BLOG quoting it (deep links verified) → 8-part spine in subtitles → crests/breadcrumbs → validate-mdx → qwen ghost-read ≥95 tri-check → own encircled panel as OG.

templates.name: delegation-package
templates.when: delegate room subdivide mesh bifurcate assign outside window
templates.skeleton: Author spec+context → bifurcate --from <room> --to <fitting room> --commit (NEVER a branch) → the commit-triptych receipt IS the delegation email → residue QC-routed, never dropped.

templates.name: controller-stage
templates.when: cron schedule poller daemon periodic daily tick automation
templates.skeleton: New periodic work = a STAGE in scripts/controller/tick.sh: PULL(sh $0) → MATCH(SQL exactly-once, stamp) → FIRE(batched, model-pinned worker) → MARK(SQL). Add to the cost-guard test list.

templates.name: reef-densify
templates.when: rules template lens reef routing sort misroute densify vocab
templates.skeleton: Harvest the lesson into per-domain rules (symptom vocabulary — readers arrive with the 500, not the tool name) → verify routing (routeToDomain score) + sort (fixtures rel@1) → guard the fixture.

templates.name: lab-experiment
templates.when: experiment measure baseline denominator ab arm battery prove
templates.skeleton: One-bit arms → deterministic metrics only (LLM reads the report, never grades the run) → quality and cost must CO-MOVE → append the ndjson keyed by reef version → the envelope is the ratchet.

templates.name: outreach-forwardable
templates.when: outreach lead investor carrier email pitch external send
templates.skeleton: Role-addressed forwarding PACKAGE to self (never person-addressed direct) → two docs (email + objectives) → lead with what retires the risk/discount → canonical door, grade ≥95, Ava bundle.

templates.name: receipt-evidence
templates.when: prove receipt evidence encircled panel verify show demo
templates.skeleton: The fix proves itself through the ONE pipeline: hooks-ON commit → the emailed receipt (encircled shape + from→to + LANE + stories) is the evidence — dogfood is the demo, never a mock.

templates.name: hindsight-audit
templates.when: backtest history retroactive hindsight replay past commits optimize
templates.skeleton: Replay git history through the deterministic router (~1s/120 commits, non-LLM) → ground truth = the commit's own diff paths → misses bake AUDITABLE sha-lists into rule meta → LLM only reads the report.

templates.name: trace-session
templates.when: trace decisions justify chat session retrospective explain choices happened reasoning recap
templates.skeleton: Retrospective, NOT a task: reconstruct from receipts (transcript · decisions-ledger · lens-receipts · git log) — every claim cites its receipt; decisions numbered, each with its why + evidence; NO repo edits.

templates.name: continuation
templates.when: task notification background completed status output exit code finished watcher summary daemon returned
templates.skeleton: A background task finished: read its output file FIRST, verify the receipt/exit state matches the claim, report the delta in ONE line, then advance the pipeline exactly one step or stop — never re-launch blindly.

templates.name: refine-artifact
templates.when: refine revise extend rework improve polish existing blogpost draft argue against tradeoff pros cons parts extended tighten
templates.skeleton: REVISE, not create: read the CURRENT artifact end-to-end first; preserve its invariants (crest variants · anchors · frontmatter · voice); argue for/against any restructure BEFORE doing it; one refinement pass = one commit.

templates.name: ratify-decision
templates.when: good enough perfect options confirm keep decided sure works great awesome fair agreed settled
templates.skeleton: The user is CHOOSING, not tasking: restate the decision in ONE line, record it where it governs (spec · ledger · rule), apply only the minimal delta it implies, confirm — no scope creep, no re-opening settled options.

templates.name: park-idea
templates.when: maybe half mind idea park later someday nothing change something could hmm ponder
templates.skeleton: A maybe/someday thought: do NOT execute it now. Capture it revivable-cold (self-prompt --due, or bifurcate to its room) with enough context to stand alone; confirm exactly where it is parked.

templates.name: institutional-outreach
templates.when: outreach engagement executive broker underwriter CRO carrier reinsurer risk committee rejection negotiation buyer prospect cold high-stakes Marsh Denny dinner connect pitch principal EA gatekeeper email reply
templates.skeleton: CANONICAL SEQUENCE FIRST (hard rule, governs message ORDER before the 5 devices): Why-Believe → Connection → Contribution → Growth → Uncertainty → Certainty → Significance → Evidence. Establish CONNECTION before you name the Uncertainty/regulatory-trap — leading with the trap reads as an attack on their competence, not a shared problem (handshake before the punch). THEN apply the devices: GRAB THE PLAYBOOK (docs/comms/institutional-comms-gauntlet.md) before it leaves drafts. 5 devices: (1) CONCEDE the build — spare the engineers egos; (2) RULE OF EVIDENCE — SOX/EU-AI-Act separation of duties, ONE anchor not four; (3) HARDWARE PRIMITIVE as METAPHOR — black-box-not-flight-log, never the jargon; (4) MECHANISM not boast — name runs-locally-via-npx, not zero-exfil-trust-us; (5) PRICE discoverable not stated (off the message, on /pricing). Posture = NOTICE not PITCH; save-you-time is un-offendable. On a rejection: no ask, no links, no cell — the armed question is the payload. qwen-grade as the REAL principal before send.
